The resolution of the detector used was 2.0 keV full

For short-lived target were irradiated one at a
time for 5-15 sec at a flux of 5 X 10**12 n/cm2/sec.
For long-lived target were irradiated one at a time
for 9-30 min at a flux of 1.2 X 10**12 n/cm2/sec.
